title: ceropegia lankana
intro: Ceropegia lankana, also known as the Lankan ross's ceropegia, is a flowering plant species in the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its roots and stems have been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceropegia lankana are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often dried and processed into powders or decoctions for use in traditional remedies.
